name: CASCADE Ontology (Audience Translation & Fidelity Tracking)
description: Audience cascade model for strategy communication: five cascade levels (Board → C-Suite → Leadership → Teams → Individuals), audience-appropriate translation rules, fidelity scoring between levels, channel mapping, and cascade effectiveness metrics. Ensures strategic intent is translated — not diluted — as it flows through organisational layers. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SC sub-series.

components.AudienceCascade: Container for a full cascade model linking narrative to audience levels
components.CascadeLevel: One of five organisational audience tiers: Board, C-Suite, Leadership, Teams, Individuals
components.CascadeTranslation: Audience-appropriate translation of a narrative for a specific cascade level
components.FidelityAssessment: Fidelity score measuring accuracy of translation between adjacent levels
components.TranslationRule: Detail depth, language register, and metric granularity rules per level
components.ChannelMapping: Communication medium mapping per audience at each cadence point
components.CascadeMetric: Effectiveness measurement: reach, comprehension, and alignment per level

crossOntology.name: cascadeLevelMapsToRole
crossOntology.purpose: Cascade levels map to RRR executive role hierarchy

crossOntology.name: translationOfNarrative
crossOntology.purpose: Translations are audience-specific versions of the core narrative

crossOntology.name: cascadeConnectsToOKR
crossOntology.purpose: Team and individual cascade levels connect to OKR objectives

domain: Strategy Communication, Audience Management, Organisational Alignment

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — Audience Cascade, Translation Rules, Fidelity Scoring, Channel Mapping, Cascade Metrics

notes: Layer C2 (Cascade) of VSOM Strategy Communication. Ensures strategy is translated — not diluted — as it flows through five organisational audience tiers. Fidelity scores detect drift between intended and perceived strategy at each level.
